sanskrit:
वक्तुमर्हस्यशेषेण दिव्या ह्यात्मविभूतयः।
याभिर्विभूतिभिर्लोकानिमांस्त्वं व्याप्य तिष्ठसि॥
transliteration: vaktum arhasy aśeṣeṇa divyā hy ātma-vibhūtayaḥ | yābhir vibhūtibhir lokān imāṃs tvaṃ vyāpya tiṣṭhasi ||
literal_meaning: Please speak in full detail of Your divine Self-manifestations by which You pervade and abide in all these worlds.
contextual_meaning: Arjuna, having experientially verified Krishna’s transcendence, now seeks a cognitive map of divine presence so others can locate the sacred within ordinary life.
psychological_state: Post-insight integration phase: the mind that has tasted wholeness now asks for a taxonomy of sacred patterns to anchor future attention.
trigger_scenario: After a peak experience (retreat, therapy breakthrough, or flow state) you ask your mentor: 'How do I keep seeing the magic when Monday’s emails hit?'
anchor_text: See the sacred in every corner of life.
